stemHtml: A heavy aircraft is landing behind a light aircraft. ATC asks the heavy aircraft to reduce speed by 20 kt. What is the reason?

options.a: To achieve an orderly and safe traffic flow.
options.b: The pilot must not delay the approach and must maintain high speed until at least 4 NM from touchdown.
options.c: The pilot will not receive a landing clearance until the preceding aircraft has vacated the runway.
